ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feature_importance" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "proportions_train" REAL /* Proportion of the feature in the training dataset */,
  "proportions_new" REAL /* Proportion of the feature in the new dataset */,
  "contribution" REAL /* Contribution of the feature to the model's predictions */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model associated with the feature importance */,
  "date_calculated" TEXT /* Date when the feature importance was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (categorical, numerical, etc.) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the feature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (training, validation, test) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix of the model as a JSON string */,
  "date_evaluated" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Current grade of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "previous_gpa" REAL /* Previous GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student predicted */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted academic outcome */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "date_predicted" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual academic outcome after the prediction */,
  "outcome_match" INTEGER /* Indicates if the predicted outcome matched the actual outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "educator_name" TEXT /* Name of the educator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the educator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the educator belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the educator */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the intervention */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator initiating the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "date_initiated" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was initiated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention (improved, no change, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (PDF, HTML, etc.) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of educators or administrators who received the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version identifier for the predictive model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the model version */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON string of performance metrics for the model version */,
  "model_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator accessing the model */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)
